content: Remote OK Marketing Assistant Brooklyn Cured <p>Brooklyn Cured is looking for a highly organized, creative, and analytical Marketing Assistant to support our growing brand across retail, sales, and marketing initiatives.The right candidate is detail-oriented, comfortable working with data and presentations, and excited to help bring new products and packaging to life. This is an ideal role for someone who is eager to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced food company.</p><p><br></p><p><strong>Responsibilities</strong></p><ul><li>Analyze and report syndicated data from Nielsen/market reporting platforms to support sales and marketing initiatives</li><li>Create charts, graphs, and PowerPoint presentations for customer meetings, retailer presentations, and internal reporting</li><li>Serve as the primary coordinator for all new label and packaging projects, including managing timelines, revisions, approvals, and communication with designers, printers, and regulatory partners</li><li>Support the planning and execution of marketing campaigns, promotions, and trade shows</li><li>Assist with social media content, email marketing, and website updates</li><li>Conduct market and competitive research to identify category trends and opportunities</li><li>Help organize brand assets, product photography, and marketing materials</li><li>Provide administrative and logistical support for the marketing and sales teams</li><li>Contribute creative ideas that strengthen Brooklyn Curedâs brand presence and storytelling</li><li>Represent the brand at trade shows and events </li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>Qualifications</strong></p><ul><li>Bachelorâs degree in Marketing, Communications, Business, or a related field</li><li>1â3 years of relevant marketing experience (internships included)</li><li>Strong PowerPoint and Excel skills, including creating graphs and organizing data</li><li>Comfortable working with data and drawing insights from reports</li><li>Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail</li><li>Ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines simultaneously</li><li>Strong written and verbal communication skills</li><li>Interest in food, CPG brands, and consumer trends</li><li>Experience with Nielsen, SPINS, Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or social media platforms is a plus</li></ul><p><br></p><p><strong>What Weâre Looking For</strong></p><ul><li>Weâre looking for someone who is proactive, collaborative, and excited to grow with an entrepreneurial food brand.
